---

## Description {#description}

Contains information about parts which are currently in a process of moving between shards and their progress.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `database` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The name of the database where move is performed.
- `table` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The name of the table where move is performed.
- `task_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The name of the moving task.
- `task_uuid` ([UUID](/sql-reference/data-types/uuid)) — The identifier of the moving task.
- `create_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) — The time when the task was created.
- `part_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The name of the part which is in a process of moving.
- `part_uuid` ([UUID](/sql-reference/data-types/uuid)) — The UUID of the part which is in a process of moving.
- `to_shard` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The name of the destination shard.
- `dst_part_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The result part name.
- `update_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) — The last time update was performed.
- `state` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The current state of the move.
- `rollback` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The flag which indicated whether the operation was rolled back.
- `num_tries` ([UInt32](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The number of tries to complete the operation.
- `last_exception` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The last exception name if any.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
